# @hoge1e3/on-resume

Event fires on current browser tab re-activated after inactivated.

## Function

on("resume",handler)

- Calls handler when browser tab re-activated.
- Resumption is detected using `setInterval` and called every 20 milliseconds when active. If the actual call interval becomes longer (500 milliseconds or more), it is considered “inactive.” When it is called again at approximately 20-millisecond intervals, it is considered “resumed.”

## Usage

~~~js
#!run
import {on} from "@hoge1e3/on-resume";

export function main() {
    on("resume",()=>{
        alert("Resumed!");    
    });
}
~~~
